entry.title: Re: ADT access to ABAP Trial
entry.content:
It would have been sufficient to delete the ABAP instance in your trial instance and then recreate it using the booster.

How to delete and re-create your ABAP environment ... - SAP Community

This would trigger the creation of a user on one of the ABAP instances that are used as shared trial instances.

However, deleting the whole trial account also works ;-).

Kind regards,

Andre

entry.title: Re: authorization required access to login sap btp trial on eclipse
entry.content:
Here a description how to delete the ABAP instance for those that run into the same issue but have no clue how to delete the same.

And I can confirm that the answer from @Vineeth_nekkanti1307 is correct 👍.

Kind regards,

Andre

entry.title: Re: Natural language queries to SAP S/4HANA - Generative AI extension on SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hello Gunter,

thanks for your article. l find it is very interesting to use LLM tp consume cds view entity via odbc for abap. l also tried some code (it would be better to have a look on your plugin to SQLAlchemy), but l am not sure, if your method wokrs for on premise ABAP system, too (error with connectiion to the system). Did you use ODBC datasource? Or just through BTP destination to communicate with backend system. Thanks for your reply in advandce.

entry.title: Re: Free SAP Certification and practice systems for students & lecturers

See this guide on the topic: https://learning.sap.com/helpcenter/certification-support/sap-universal-id 

Thanks for your interest!

entry.title: Ariba PO Number Range Configuration
entry.content: Where do you go to configure the purchase order number range in Ariba? We want to use a number range of 2500000000 - 2599999999 but our consultants are saying we have to prefix it with "EP" I would like to see where this is configured. Or can it only be done by shared services.

entry.title: 3 Reasons to Register for the Modernizing SAP BW with SAP Business Data Cloud Webinar
entry.content:
SAP Business Warehouse has been a cornerstone data warehousing application for organization across industries for over 25 years. However, as market requirements and business needs continue to evolve, there has been a shift from traditional IT-centric systems to comprehensive multi-cloud architectures.

If you’re looking to modernize to the cloud while retaining the value of your SAP BW data for re-use, mark your calendar for SAP’s upcoming webinar: Modernizing SAP Business Warehouse with SAP Business Data Cloud. We are excited to have Accenture as a partner in this session, where we’ll explore how you can minimize migration risks and preserve your valuable SAP BW or SAP BW/4HANA objects in SAP Business Data Cloud.

Why should you register? Here are the top three reasons:

1. Explore a streamlined modernization approach to the cloud

We understand that your SAP BW system is integral to your data ecosystem, and significant resources have been invested in it over the years. In this webinar, you will discover how you can preserve these investments with a streamlined modernization approach to the cloud. Learn how SAP Business Data Cloud allows you to modernization your SAP BW data into a private cloud environment fully managed by SAP, enabling you to deliver your SAP BW data as data products. This approach provides a flexible framework to adopt SAP Business Data Cloud at your own pace – without the need to rebuild models or objects using a third-party solution.

2. Maximize the value of your SAP BW data with SAP Business Data Cloud

See how you can unlock more value from your SAP BW data with the latest data and AI capabilities in SAP Business Data Cloud. Learn how to unleash transformative insights with SAP managed data products, intelligent apps, and support for data engineering and advanced AI/ML workloads in SAP Databricks.

3. See it in action

Often, the best way to understand how a system works is to see it live. We’ll walk you through a product demo showcasing the end-to-end processing of provisioning your SAP BW objects with the data product generator in SAP Business Data Cloud. See how easy it can be to leverage your SAP BW data in the cloud while maintaining its business context and value.

Secure your spot now!

Don’t miss out on this opportunity to explore how you can get started with modernizing your SAP BW system with SAP Business Data Cloud to unleash the power of AI with trusted business data. Register today to secure your spot and take the first step towards transforming your SAP BW data for the future!

entry.title: Customer Self Service PO collection _ PO projection letter_Download capability in SAP for Me
entry.content:
Please find how you can easily download your PO projection letter from within SAP for Me.

There is also a short video to help you. Digital Library

 

For Direct Maintenance PO projection letter downloads; From the “Home” page in SAP for Me, you need to go to the “Finance and Legal” page, “On Premise Tab”. 

Scroll down to the “Maintenance” tab.

On the right hand side of the Maintenance card heading, next to Manage PO numbers, you will see a “Download” button.

If you click on the downward arrow, you will see a description of the available PDFs with the date that the PDF was created.

The PDF will be for Maintenance orders only; in all distribution channel and billing type combinations.

As you are aware, this will include the Consumer Price Index (CPI) increase.

Also, it will overwrite the old one, once a new one is available.

If no new PO projection PDF was created, the old PDF will no longer be displayed in SAP for Me, after 548 days.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

For Direct Cloud PO projection letter downloads; Again, go from the Home page in SAP for Me, to the Finance and Legal page, “Cloud” tab and scroll to “Contracts”.

On the right hand side of the Contract Card, you see Manage PO numbers.

Click on this and IF there is a PO Projection downloaded, you will see the PDF to click on under the Downloads column on the far right hand side.  Scroll down until you see the PO projection letter link and click to open.

The PDF will be for Cloud Orders only

It will be available from the date that the PDF was created

It will be for all distribution channels and all order types (Volume business orders and provider contracts)

One letter per order is stored

Also, it will overwrite the old one, once a new one is available.

If no new PO projection PDF was created, the old PDF will no longer be displayed in SAP for Me, after 548 days.

Finally, please note that it does not include Consumer Price Index (CPI)

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Now, you should be able to download your PO projection letter, for both Maintenance and Cloud.

Should you have any questions, feel free to reach out to our customer service for assistance.   

Thank you for using “SAP for Me”.

entry.title: Undefined new sap.ui.layout.form.SimpleForm
entry.content:
Hi,

I have defined the SimpleForm control as below and it has always worked in Neo.

I am testing the same app / control in Foundry Dev subaccount and also works, however when testing in Pre-Prod subaccount sometimes it works and sometimes I have the error: Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'SimpleForm').

 
var dialog = new sap.m.Dialog({
                title: sMsgYA,
                type: "Message",
                state: "Success",
                content: [
                    new sap.ui.layout.form.SimpleForm({
                        editable: false,
 
Does anybody know what the error might be?.
Thanks,
Javier

entry.title: H1_2025 | Display of Direct Reports / Team Size in Profile Preview
entry.content:
@DianaLiden  ,  

Are we losing the capability to see the number of direct reports / Team Size in Profile Preview ? 

There is no indicator other than that in legacy Profile to identify who is a manager or not.

if we don't have a way to see it from Profile Preview, we have a serious gap compared to H2 2024 release

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Data Cloud - FAQs
entry.content:
@SAPda If you LIFT your SAP BW 7.5 on HANA under SAP BDC, SAP BW PCE (private cloud edition), then Mainstream maintenance until 2030 instead of 2027 for the on-premise edition.

Thank you - Jeet

entry.title: Re: ASP.NET Report Viewer & multiple IIS Worker Processes
entry.content: Are sticky sessions enabled in IIS? That's a must do, consult MS doc's on how to enable. Sessions is a must though, so the request doesn't get sent to a different Web Server when the Report is open in this one... Must also be using PostBack also so it again goes back to the same session... KBA shows you how to.

entry.title: SAC: Story filter not working when set to single selection
entry.content:
Hello, 

We are setting up filters for the story and we have a problem with one of the dimensions.

When setting the filter if we configure it as multiple selection it works properly: 

 

But we just one the user to be able to select one, and when we configure the filter to single selection it doesn't work. 

With the other dimensions: Sociedad and Area funcional we have set the filters as single selection without any problems. Does anyone know what is happening? 

We check the dimension in the model and we don't see any difference with the other dimension.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Deep Link Report
entry.content: Hi Brian, I'm facing a similar need—were you able to include the deeplink to the Item in your report?

entry.title: ¿Eres estudiante de carreras afines a la tecnología?

¡ASUG México tiene una gran oportunidad para ti!

Únete a nuestra Membresía Estudiantil y prepárate para una carrera exitosa en el ecosistema SAP.

🚀¿Qué te ofrece la Membresía Estudiantil?
- Acceso gratuito por 6 meses
- Conocimiento de primera mano de las soluciones SAP
- Formación y aprendizaje continuo
- Conexión con expertos y profesionales de la industria
- Oportunidades de networking y desarrollo profesional

🎯¿Qué beneficios obtendrás?
- Acceso a toda la información y recursos de ASUG México
- Portal web con contenido exclusivo
- Sesiones informativas y a sesiones Grupos de Interés sobre las últimas tendencias tecnológicas y en SAP

¿Quieres saber como ser parte de la Membresía Estudiantil? Ingresa aquí ➡️: https://loom.ly/UMWTzyI 

Para aprender sobre los Grupos de Usuarios de SAP visita SAP User Groups | Customer Engagement | SAP

entry.title: Table function in Public Cloud using standard Table
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have created a table function on the public cloud. In the class, I can't use VBRK, so I'm using I_BillingDocumentBasic. But it's showing an error like this.

"I_BILLINGDOCUMENTBASIC" is client-specific and restricts access to a single client. The calling AMDP method "GET_DATA" must also allow this restriction."

How to fix this error?

Can anyone answer this?

 

Thanks,

Naveen

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to use Web Service as a source for Web Intelligence document?
entry.content:
Have you checked this with other services ?
e.g. https://services.odata.org/V3/Northwind/Northwind.svc/

entry.title: How to use S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition data with PowerBI
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community!

Hope you're all doing well. A brief summary of my situation: I need to use data that's being stored in S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, a bunch of already-defined tables, to use said data with PowerBI. My current issue is finding any way to access the S/4HANA Cloud data externally!

This is my first time trying to use SAP data with PBI and would like to read your ideas to achieve such a connection!

I'm currently leaning towards using automation tools (such as Power Automate) for data extraction from SAP GUI and then use it con PBI, althought the refresh frequency is a big disadvantage.

Any help is greatly appreciated.

Thank you,

Daniel.

Can you please check the apps "Change Material Costs" or "Material Price Change" which will allow you to choose the sales document and item information for the material as shown below to set the new price? I would request you to test the app to determine if it meets your requirements. Thanks.

 

Regards

Jai Srinivasan

entry.title: Re: Query to show "Production Order" and related "Issue f...
entry.content: Thanks Pau,

entry.title: App-to-App navigation via Link/Popover on SAP Build Workzone with Fiori Elements
entry.content:
Hi Fiori Elements community,

I am developing a Fiori Elements List report application with a CAP OData v4 as the service layer.
I want to enable external app navigation via annotations to several other fiori applications. This is possible via the annotation UI.DataFieldForActionGroup and UI.DataFieldForIntentBasedNavigation

annotate service.Entity with @(
    UI.LineItem                    : [
        {
            $Type  : 'UI.DataFieldForActionGroup',
            Label  : 'Navigate To',
            Actions: [
                {
                    $Type          : 'UI.DataFieldForIntentBasedNavigation',
                    Action         : 'display',
                    SemanticObject : 'Object1',
                    RequiresContext: true,
                    Label          : 'App 1'
                },
                {
                    $Type          : 'UI.DataFieldForIntentBasedNavigation',
                    Action         : 'manage',
                    SemanticObject : 'Object2',
                    RequiresContext: true,
                    Label          : 'App 2'
                },
            ]
        },
    ],
)

 This will result in an action in the table toolbar

 

However I would like to get a column which will display a certain property of my entity as a link, e.g.:

This can be done with UI.DataFieldWithIntentBasedNavigation inside UI.LineItem. It would be great to assign several SemanticObject/Action combinations to this link, which are displayed in a Popover, so the user can choose to which app should be navigated.
I tried a combination with UI.DataFieldWithActionGroup and entries of UI.DataFieldWithIntentBasedNavigation but this is just ignored from the Fiori Elements framework.

Any help is greatly appreciated.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Query to show "Production Order" and related "Issue f...
entry.content: Thanks Paul, This is where I'm at so far, it seems to be working but to get it to not duplicate lines I'm using Distinct and a dodgy Where clause to block out lines where the bin location is blank, not ideal. If anyone can take a look and see how I can improve this to not need the where clause that would be great:

entry.title: Re: Query to show "Production Order" and related "Issue f...
entry.content: Sorry, it keeps posting before I finish typing! Code here: SELECT DISTINCT T0."DocNum" AS "PO No.", T0."ItemCode", T0."ProdName" AS "Description", T0."Status", T0."Type", T0."PlannedQty", T0."CmpltQty", T0."RjctQty", T0."PostDate" AS "DocDate", T0."StartDate", T0."DueDate", T0."CardCode", T0."Warehouse" AS "Header Warehouse", T0."Project", T0."Printed", T1."LineNum" + 1 AS "LineNum", T1."VisOrder"+1 AS "VisOrder", T1."ItemCode" AS "Line ItemCode", T1."ItemName" AS "Line Description", T1."BaseQty", T1."PlannedQty" AS "Line Planned Qty", T1."IssuedQty", T1."wareHouse" AS "Line Warehouse", T10."DocNum" AS "Issue No.", T10."DocDate" AS "Issue Doc Date", T14."BinCode" FROM OWOR T0 INNER JOIN WOR1 T1 ON T0."DocEntry" = T1."DocEntry" LEFT JOIN OITM T2 ON T0."ItemCode" = T2."ItemCode" LEFT JOIN OITB T3 ON T2."ItmsGrpCod" = T3."ItmsGrpCod" LEFT OUTER JOIN OCRD T4 ON T0."CardCode" = T4."CardCode" LEFT OUTER JOIN ORDR T5 ON T0."OriginAbs" = T5."DocEntry" AND T0."LinkToObj" = '17' LEFT OUTER JOIN RDR1 T6 ON T5."DocEntry" = T6."DocEntry" AND T6."ItemCode" = T0."ItemCode" LEFT OUTER JOIN OITM T7 ON T1."ItemCode" = T7."ItemCode" AND T1."ItemType" = '4' -- For Component items LEFT OUTER JOIN ORSC T8 ON T1."ItemCode" = T8."ResCode" AND T1."ItemType" = '290' -- For Resource items --LEFT OUTER JOIN WOR4 T9 ON T1."StageId" = T9."StageId" LEFT JOIN IGE1 T11 ON T1."DocEntry" = T11."BaseEntry" and T1."LineNum" = T11."BaseLine" --and T11."BaseType"=202 LEFT JOIN OIGE T10 on T1."DocEntry"=T10."BaseEntry" LEFT JOIN OILM T12 ON T11."DocEntry" = T12."DocEntry" AND T11."ObjType" = T12."TransType" AND T11."ItemCode" = T12."ItemCode" --AND T12."LocCode" = T11."WhsCode" LEFT JOIN OBTL T13 ON T12."MessageID" = T13."MessageID" LEFT JOIN OBIN T14 ON T13."BinAbs" = T14."AbsEntry" LEFT JOIN IBT1 T15 ON T11."ObjType" = T15."BaseType" AND T11."ItemCode" = T15."ItemCode" AND T11."DocEntry" = T15."BaseEntry" AND T11."LineNum" = T15."BaseLinNum" AND T11."WhsCode" = T15."WhsCode" LEFT JOIN OBTN T16 ON T16."DistNumber" = T15."BatchNum" LEFT JOIN ITL1 T17 ON T16."SysNumber" = T17."SysNumber" AND T11."ItemCode" = T17."ItemCode" AND T13."SnBMDAbs" = T17."MdAbsEntry" WHERE T0."DocNum" = '1014' AND T14."BinCode" > ''

entry.title: U: Error or Bug in Analytics Cloud Live Model Parameter F4 Help for ID or description search
entry.content:
Hello,

is there an  error or bug in the Analytics Cloud Live Model with a Parameter in  the F4 Help for ID or description search ?

In a SAC live model Story I got a with a Query parameter for company code.
Entering in the F4 Help of  a Live Model Query Parameter  an Id or a description,
I get this error message:

"
The feature requested by the client using BW InA is not implemented; you may create a development request. Class: 'CL_BICS_INA_PROC_DATA_F4',
Method:'EXECUTE',
Context:'OR selection not supported, cf. class CL_RSMD_RS_SPECIAL, SET_SELECTION_SELOPT_OR'
"

Is this still :
 2931956 - "Feature is currently not supported" message when using advanced filter and cross-tab in SAP Analytics Cloud for Planning (SAC)

Does a CL_BICS_INA_PROC_DATA_F4 implementation enable the Click to take the parameter over into the parameter list ?

Any sample for the Extension suggested in the error message ?
Thank You !

Martin

entry.title: Re: C_ACTIVATE22 or C_ACT_2403

Hi @S0023334531 
Please access the SAP CERTIFICATION C_ACT SAP Certified Associate - Project Manager - SAP Activate site.
in the How to prepare section you find

  • a list of topics that may be covered within this SAP Certification and the courses that touches on these topics. Its accuracy does not constitute a legitimate claim. SAP reserves the right to update the exam content (topics, items, weighting) at any time.
  • The recommend learning material

The link to the sample question for self-evaluation purpose is also available on the site.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Migrating to Crystal 64-bit questions

Ie I persuaded the old sources to give me their secrets. Have fun as a retired person and please hang out here as you have lots of knowledge accumulated over the years!

entry.title: Re: BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE
entry.content: Thank you Dominik. I'm trying to do this in a VB.net program and just cant seem to get it committed. posted

entry.title: Re: EWM: Planned replenishment with layout-orientated war...
entry.content:
Hi @Hansdadad , I checked in my sandbox-this is the best practice WH 1710...

Alternative:-  Please switch on your HU Type Check , May be you can change level of available  Qty as 1 (Storage bin) in your Storage Type Y500 . Then System would not stop because it would not select the HU at the time of WT creation and Replenish WT/O created with no HU in WT.  User/Picker/Replenisher  has to enter/scan HU at the time of remove HU from Storage Type Y500.  

Kind regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Customizations export/import in Opensearch dashboard
entry.content:
How we can export and import all customizations like alerts and saved objects from Opensearch dashboard?

 

 

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Customizations export/import in Opensearch dashboard
entry.content:
OpenSearch Dashboards provides means to import resources (Saved Objects) into your instances. Resources could be created, exported, and imported across different instances of OpenSearch. Types of resources include:

  • Index-Patterns
  • Visualizations
  • Searches
  • Dashboards

For detailed steps on how to do it, please refer SAP help page https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_COMMERCE_CLOUD_PUBLIC_CLOUD/0fa6bcf4736c46f78c248512391eb467/210c65777ab446189a772b1ead929d69.html?locale=en-US.

entry.title: Re: BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE
entry.content: I'm writing the routine as shown: Dim resultdata As IRfcStructure = rfcFunctionx.GetStructure("GOODSMVT_HEADRET") Dim matdoc As String = resultdata.GetString("MAT_DOC") Dim matyr As String = resultdata.GetString("DOC_YEAR") If Not String.IsNullOrEmpty(matdoc) Then Console.WriteLine(matdoc & " :" & matyr) End If Dim retTable As IRfcTable = rfcFunctionx.GetTable("RETURN") Dim haserror As Boolean = False For Each returnmsg As IRfcStructure In retTable If returnmsg.GetString("TYPE") = "E" Then haserror = True End If Next If Not haserror Then Dim bapicommit As IRfcFunction = sapDestinationbrv.Repository.CreateFunction("BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT") bapicommit.SetValue("WAIT", "X") 'x bapicommit.Invoke(sapDestinationbrv) Dim commitReturn As IRfcStructure = bapicommit.GetStructure("RETURN") Dim returntype As String = commitReturn.GetString("TYPE") Dim returnmsg As String = commitReturn.GetString("MESSAGE") Console.WriteLine(returntype & ":" & returnmsg) Console.WriteLine("Goods posted") End if

entry.title: Re: ETL Objects in SAP Datasphere and Dataflows Example
entry.content:
DP agent is required for SDI/SDA to connect to the remote source.

Cloud connector is required along with DP agent for on-premise to Cloud, Cloud to on premise or Cloud to Cloud connection scenarios.

You can talk to a SAP BASIS person on the same.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to use Web Service as a source for Web Intelligence document?
entry.content:
oData Services can be tested with transaction
/IWFND/GW_CLIENT

check if this one helps, it is about client safe amdp.

entry.title: Re: In S/4HANA 2023, can we write script using screen per...
entry.content: SAP Screen Personas can only modify classic, dynpro-based applications (transactions). Fiori apps are not supported.

entry.title: Re: allocation number equal to refference number
entry.content: What number do you currently have in reference field and what is the source of this number?

entry.title: Re: Connection - The default connection string cannot be used in sap business one, version for SAP H
entry.content:
Thank you, Mahendrakumar!

You might want to correct the SAP Note Number. The correct number is 2755830, the note number 2755380 is incorrect.

Direct Link: 2755830 - The Use of the UI API Connection String Is Not Recommended - SAP for Me

Best regards,

Joerg.

Please provide configuration step or Tcode to add my USER ID as approver in SBWP

 

Please help us on this

Thanks in advance

Regards

Jithendra Shivashankar

entry.title: Re: Pay component required on Decimal to publish in EC
entry.content:
Hi @SF_Abhisek 

None. Hopefully you have the right value in one of the columns with all decimals and if so then you run an adhoc report and publish to EC by file import just for this year. 

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Re: x-csrf-token extraction encrypted SHA256 error 403 CSRF token validation failed cloud integratio
entry.content: I tried all the steps but I still get the token in SHA256 encrypted form. I am trying to create a flow which first fetches the csrf token and then do a POST call to S4 Hana system for an API. But I keep getting 403 error with CSRF token validation failure.

entry.title: Unable to get a notification when a payment document is rejected
entry.content:
Hi,

As part of the supplier payment processing, we are trying to activate a workflow that sends a notification to the accounts payable accountant whenever a payment document is rejected. However, we have not been able to get it to work properly.

Here is the configuration we have implemented :

1.    Maintained employees using the "Maintain Workforce" tile.
2.    Created a team in "Manage Teams and Responsibilities" and assigned members with the function “Process Rejected Payments.”
3.    Copied and activated the default workflow for rejected payments via the “Manage Workflows – For Rejected Payments” tile.
4.    Maintained email templates by copying the standard template SWF_CRT_NOTIFY_RECIPIENTS, following the naming convention : YY1_78500057_CRT_ALL.
5.    Set up email notifications for workflow approvals and rejections by copying the standard email template SWF_WORKFLOW_COMPLETE_NOTIFY, with the following naming conventions:
             o    YY1_78500057_COMPLETE_POSITIVE – for approved workflows.
             o    YY1_78500057_COMPLETE_NEGATIVE – for rejected workflows.

We followed the guidance provided in the SAP blog How to Set Up the Email Notification for Flexible ... - SAP Community , which we believe aligns with our requirements.

With this setup, payment approvers do receive email notifications for payments pending their action. However, the accounts payable accountant does not receive any notification when a payment is rejected.

Can you please advise ? 

Thanks and regards,

entry.title: Re: Get records based on a another table that has a range (ABAP CDS)
entry.content:
Hi,

please check following code with the exists statement:

REPORT ztest.

TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_a,
         code TYPE char2,
       END OF ty_a,
       BEGIN OF ty_b,
         low  TYPE char2,
         high TYPE char2,
       END OF ty_B.
DATA: lt_a TYPE TABLE OF ty_a,
      lt_b TYPE TABLE OF ty_b.

lt_a = VALUE #( ( code = 'B1' ) ( code = 'B2' ) ( code = 'B3' ) ( code = 'B4' ) ( code = 'B5' ) ( code = 'B6' ) ( code = 'C1' ) ( code = 'c1' ) ).
lt_b = VALUE #( ( low = 'B2' high = 'B4' ) ( low = 'C1' ) ).

modify ZTEST_B from table lt_b.

SELECT a~code
FROM @LT_a AS a
WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ZTEST_B AS b WHERE ( b~low <= a~code AND  b~high >= a~code ) OR b~high IS INITIAL AND b~low = a~code )
INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_result).

entry.title: AP Datasphere - is it possible to use hierarchies with directory in Business Builder?
entry.content:
Hello,

Could anyone please let me know if it is possible to use Hierarchies with Directory in the Datasphere Business Builder? I did use them with Analytical models before and they work seamlessly!

However, I did read a few blogs from the year 2023 which state the only parent-child hierarchies are possible with the Business Builder and that is with limitations with the drill down on SAC, is it still the case?

Kind regards,

Ashwin

entry.title: Re: Training, practice, free usage of system
entry.content:
Hello @Rafal11,

You can practice FREE in live SAP environments - https://learning.sap.com/practice-systems

If it helped, mark thread as accepted solution.

Thanks & Regards,
Kunal Bansal, SAP CX SME
https://www.linkedin.com/in/thekunalbansal

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now

Thanks Bro  - it works now

entry.title: Re: Document Number Range Issue for Prior Year Posting –...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your questions on the SAP Community blog.

This issue typically arises in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition due to the way number ranges are assigned to document types and fiscal years. Let’s walk through the root cause and how you can correct it.

 

Root Cause Analysis

In S/4HANA Cloud, number ranges are maintained per fiscal year and per document type, and assigned via configuration settings.

If the system is picking the number range for 2024-25 (starting from 14) when you're posting to 2023-24, it likely means that the number range assignment for FY 2023-24 is either missing or has been overwritten.

This typically happens if:

  • You recently opened the 2023-24 period again after year-end closing.
  • You created or adjusted the number range for the new FY but didn't preserve the previous year's assignment.
  • The number range interval for 87 was not extended or correctly defined for FY 2023-24.

 

Steps to Correct the Issue

You will need to:

  • Check the number range interval for the document type.
  • Ensure separate intervals exist for both FY 2023-24 and FY 2024-25.
  • Verify the assignment between number range and fiscal year.

1. Go to the App: “Manage Journal Entry Number Ranges”

  • App ID: FBN1 equivalent in Public Cloud is via SSCUI 101702 - Define Document Number Ranges
  • Or access via “Manage Your Solution” > Configure Your Solution

2. Select Your Document Type (e.G., SA, ZJ, etc...)

3. Ensure the following:

  • For Fiscal Year 2023, number range interval 87 exists and is assigned to your document type.
  • For Fiscal Year 2024, number range interval 14 is assigned.

4. If not, create or reassign the interval correctly:

  • Add interval 87 for FY 2023 with the correct number range (e.g., From 87000000 to 87999999)
  • Add interval 14 for FY 2024 (e.g., From 14000000 to 14999999)

5. Save and test again by posting a document dated in FY 2023-24.

 

Important Notes:

  • In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, direct access to FBN1 is restricted. You must use SSCUI (Self-Service Configuration UI) or raise a ticket via SAP Support if it's not available.
  • Always check authorization for using the configuration app if it's not visible in your tenant.

 

Recommendation

To avoid such issues during year-end activities:

  • Maintain number ranges for at least two fiscal years in advance.
  • Document the assignment logic for each document type and year for auditability and consistency.

 

I hope this explanation will help you solve your issue.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: truncate last 3 chatechter from a string
entry.content: write: / xco_cp=>string( `ABCD1234.xls` )->to( -3 )->value.

entry.title: Re: No Validation for National ID
entry.content: We have a similar concern/issue with the national id field not being validated to ensure its in the correct format. Please vote for customer influence idea: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#idea/345493?section=sectionComments

entry.title: Issue with OData Requests in Analytical Models Following the Latest SAP Datasphere Update
entry.content:
Hello everyone.

Recently, we discovered an issue in SAP Datasphere: analytical models that use views with associations as their data source no longer process OData requests as they used to. This problem seems to have emerged after the latest SAP Datasphere update.

Until a few weeks ago, OData requests on analytical models based on views with associations were working correctly. However, now these requests are failing. We attempted to resolve the issue by recreating both the view and the analytical model, but without success.

Has anyone else experienced this problem following the latest SAP Datasphere update? If so, have you found any workaround or solution to restore the functionality of OData requests on analytical models using views with associations?

Any insights or experiences you can share would be greatly appreciated.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Question on Asset Acquisition Posting in 01/2025 with...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your questions on the SAP Community blog.

Asset Accounting has strict rules about fiscal year handling, and your case sits exactly at the intersection of period closure, depreciation, and asset recognition rules.

 

Your Scenario in Brief:

Asset acquired: Identified in 01/2025.

Depreciation desired to start: 12/2024.

Posting period 12/2024: Already closed (posting is not possible).

FY 2024: Not closed (still open for audit).

You get an error when the asset value date ≠ posting date fiscal year.

 

Key Concepts in SAP FI-AA (S/4HANA Cloud)

1. Posting Date

Defines when the document hits the General Ledger.

Cannot be set in closed periods.

Technically, this determines the accounting period.

2. Asset Value Date

Triggers the start of depreciation.

Defines the capitalization date in FI-AA.

Must be in the same fiscal year as the posting date - this is standard SAP behavior to prevent mismatched accounting records.

3. Acquisition Year

Option you mentioned (current/previous year) is only relevant for manual revaluations or corrections, and mostly non-effective unless used in those contexts.

 

Why Your Attempt Fails

You want:

Posting date: 01/2025

Asset value date: 12/2024

SAP gives:

“Asset value date and posting date must be in same fiscal year”

This is standard logic and cannot be bypassed, especially in S/4HANA Cloud where direct table updates or custom logic isn't allowed.

 

Correct and Compliant Options

Option 1: Wait and Open Period 12/2024 Temporarily

Open period 12/2024, post with posting date in 12/2024 and asset value date = 12/2024.

Close period again.

This gives you the correct depreciation start.

 

Option 2: Post in 01/2025, Set Asset Value Date = 01/2025, and Adjust Depreciation Later

Post with posting date 01/2025, value date 01/2025 (SAP will allow this).

Then run depreciation recalculation (AFAR).

Manually post an unplanned depreciation for Dec 2024 equivalent if allowed by policy.

 

Option 3: Use a Prior Year Asset Transfer as a Workaround

Create a legacy asset with a value date = 12/2024

Use "Transfer within the same system" with effective date = 12/2024

No FI entry is generated if done carefully

Then post the actual acquisition in 01/2025

 

Best Practice (SAP-Recommended)

SAP recommends that the posting date and value date are always aligned, and if you missed a posting in a prior year/period, to either:

Temporarily open the prior period and post correctly, OR

Post in current period and adjust depreciation using manual posting or unplanned depreciation.

 

I hope this explanation will help you solve your issue.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Email Verification Not Triggered After Lite Registration
entry.content:
Issue:
We created a sampling form using a CIAM screenset with Lite Registration. Our goal is to send a verification email right after form submission so that only valid emails get saved and only verified users have profiles created in Gigya.
 
We've enabled the Require Email Verification setting, but the email isn't being sent out (I didn't get any email) — yet the user profile is still being created in Gigya.
 
(1) Why is this happening? (2) What steps are we missing? (3) Can Lite Registration allow email verification? Pretty sure full registration allow it.
 

#SCREENSET #registration

So want to know how many flavours can we maintain for a transaction? Also will it slow the screen processings if there are mnay flavours?

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Help Shorty - HTML5 Configuration issue "Failed to get Metadata - 400"
entry.content:
Hello Nils Janßen,

I wanted to let you know that updating the existing_destinations_policy to update successfully resolved the issue.

After making the change, I redeployed the MTA using the --force flag to ensure a complete redeployment of the application and all its components.

Thank you so much for sharing this solution—really appreciate your help!

entry.content:

In a maintenance order we have a person responsible for each operation, totaling 3 responsible, but this order is not enough for any of them in the Asset Manager mobile. 
Would this be a matter of configuration? Or in the asset manager the order only appears to one person in charge? 


Many thanks for support,

Regards,
Nathalie Fernandes

entry.title: Re: Issue with OData Requests in Analytical Models Follow...
entry.content:
An example of the error:

{
"error": {
"code": "EXTEND_CSN_FAILED",
"message": "Compile failed with: CSN_COMPILATION_FAIL",
"innererror": {
"errors": [
{
"code": "CSN_COMPILATION_FAIL",
"substitutes": [
"Errors(FORMATTED): CSN property ‘@EndUserText.label’ is not expected in ‘mixin[]’ [Ln 13234] Errors(ORIGINAL): CSN property ‘@EndUserText.label’ is not expected in ‘mixin[]’ [Ln 13234]"
]
}
],
"name": "CompileError"
}
}
}

entry.title: ABAP CDS Input Parameter - Force Mandatory Value
entry.content:
Hi, I have an ABAP CDS Query with a two parameters.  

  1. The first parameter the user can dropdown to select the appropriate value.
  2. The second parameter I am defaulting a single value and want to restrict the parameter to this value.
    I would like to restrict the parameter so the user cannot use any value other than the defaulted value.
    They can attempt to change the value, but any other value should be an input error for that parameter.
    I could hide the defaulted parameter, but I want it to show on the selection screen for added context.
    I'd like to somehow make sure it's apparent to the user that this defaulted value is the only value allowed for the input parameter.  

Is there any way possible to restrict an ABAP CDS Input Parameter to single specific value as mentioned above?   

Thanks for any input on this.

Hi Team,

When we do goods receipt of an equipment for a material can the equipment directly have the status AVLB?

Regards,

Priti

entry.title: Re: ASP.NET Report Viewer & multiple IIS Worker Processes

entry.title: Re: How can we highlight New or Featured trainings more p...
entry.content: Currently, this is the option available. Alternatively, to have a different system behavior, it would be possible to have an enhancement request created for it (as per KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/2090228), where the Learning Product Management team can further review and assess the requested functionality to be considered in a future release.

entry.title: Re: RAP100 - There are no sections. The page is empty.
entry.content: You may send a feedback to SAP via https://support.learning.sap.com > Contact Us. See my experience on feedback: https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-learning-q-a/how-long-to-get-a-learning-journey-code-error-be-fixed-by-asking-https/qaq-p/14061158.

entry.title: Sap Mobile Services Client enforce browser for corporate security requirement
entry.content:
Hi,

 

We are developing the mobile application with SAP Mobile Services for security corporate reasons (INTUNE) we need to ensure that it is running on Microsoft Edge.

Is there a way to enforce this on the SAP standard app or a custom SAP Mobile Services Client.

 

Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Sap Mobile Services Client enforce browser for corpor...
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you for the shared details about the raised query.

Regarding your question about enforcing a specific browser, such as Edge, please notice that it's not possible: the MDK client only supports using WebView or the device's browser for authentication. We do not have any option to force the use of Edge for this kind of objective.  

Nevertheless, we can provide one alternative suggestion: try to create a branded client and there you can enable "AllowCerts" in the "ConnectionSettings" to have the client call the device's browser.

Hope this helps you with your objective.

Kind regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: LRN-191759 For this notification, is it triggered by...
entry.content:
Hi @Julie_Davis_Wyn 

As far as I understood, LRN-191759 refers to notifications triggered by the managers to be sent to their subordinates. For example, the notification the managers can triggered from the Team View page > Send Reminder.

To keep the manager's email address as the 'From email address' for such notifications, the setting 'Use Application Notification User Email for manager email notifications'.

Best regards,

entry.title: ABAP CDS - Virtual Cube Read Interface IF_RSRTS_CDS_READ behavior is doubled
entry.content:
Hi, I have a simple CDS Cube using the Cube Read Interface IF_RSRTS_CDS_READ.
This interface provides three methods:
IF_RSRTS_CDS_READ~DEFINE / ~READ / ~GET_PROPERTIES

In the ~GET_PROPERTIES Method I am setting the attribute "provide_exact_data" to true.
In the ~READ Method I am calling MYCLASS=>GET_DATA method to provide the result data in one pass.
In the ~READ Method after I get the result data I set the export parameter e_end_of_data = abap_true.
In the ~READ Method after I get the result data I write the result data to a DDIC table for history
With this it seems I am getting a double dataset written to the DDIC Table!

I debugged the Interface Methods and it unexpectedly looks like the ~READ Method is getting called a second time which would explain the double dataset results.  According to the non-existent documentation on this interface, having set the "e_end_of_data" should prevent this.  Even though I set the "e_end_of_data" variable on the first pass, the second pass shows the variable is empty.

Would anyone have input on why the ~READ Method might be getting executed a second time or how I can resolve this issue?

Thanks for any help with this.

entry.title: SuccessFactors Practice systems unavailable?
entry.content:
Hi,

When navigating to my successfactors practice system (I had previously enrolled, and had been using it for the past 3 weeks), I'm presented with a message that says "System temporarily unavailable), on the main Practice System page for my learning journey.

Does that happen often? How long before the systems are back online? Any suggestions?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Learning metric
entry.content:
Hi @averellen 

For more details on such contractual details, your client might need to reach out to their CSM/CSP for further clarification.

More details can also be found in the documentation below:

  • https://me.sap.com/notes/2784798
  • https://help.sap.com/docs/successfactors-platform/managing-user-license-compliance/running-sap-successfactors-learning-usage-metrics-report
  • https://me.sap.com/notes/2559814
  • https://me.sap.com/notes/2555939

Best regards,

entry.title: Clearing Error in F-44 and F-53 Tax code ** in procedure ZTAXIN is invalid
entry.content:
Hi

I am getting the below error while clearing Spl GL transactions in the vendor.

Tax code ** in procedure ZTAXIN is invalid.

Please support.

Example advance paid via indicator - A Rs. 100000

Invoice Received for Rs. 200000 in which we have hold amount via Spl GL indicator X Rs. 50000

Transaction is below

Vendor Cr. 150000

Vendor (X) Cr. 50000

Expenses Dr 100000 

Expense Dr 100000

Both Expenses have different tax code.

now while making the payment of RS. 90000  i am getting the error.

entry.title: Re: How to know user full name and details with sy-uname
entry.content:
Open Db table 'USR21'. Pass sy-uname in field 'BNAME'. Get 'PERSNUMBER' from it.

Pass 'PERSNUMBER' in table 'ADRP', you will get name in fields as 'NAME_FIRST', 'NAME_LAST', 'NAME_TEXT'.

entry.title: Re: How to know user full name and details with sy-uname
entry.content: Try V_USR_NAME
